title: Messi to start final Argentina group match on bench
summary: Argentina manager Lionel Scaloni confirmed World Cup top scorer Lionel Messi will start the final group match against Jordan on the bench. The decision could impact Argentina's attacking options in the fixture.
content: World Cup top scorer Lionel Messi will start Argentina's final group match against Jordan on the bench, manager Lionel Scaloni confirms.

zh.title: 梅西将在阿根廷最后一场小组赛中担任替补
zh.summary: 阿根廷主教练斯卡洛尼证实，世界杯进球最多的梅西将在对阵约旦的最后一场小组赛中作为替补出场。这一决定可能会影响阿根廷在该比赛中的进攻能力。

title: Egypt through but late drama denies Iran guaranteed last 32 spot
summary: Iran drew 1-1 with Egypt in Seattle, with a late goal ruled out for offside via VAR. The result leaves Iran dependent on other outcomes to advance as one of the best third-placed teams.
content: Iran have a goal ruled out for offside and hit the crossbar in the final moments of a thrilling 1-1 draw against Egypt in Seattle, leaving them hoping to secure qualification to the FIFA World Cup knockout stages by being one of the top eight third-placed teams.

zh.title: 埃及晋级但伊朗因戏剧性晚期进球无法确保进入16强
zh.summary: 伊朗在西雅图与埃及1-1战平，一粒晚期进球因越位被视频助理裁判判罚无效。这个结果使伊朗需要依赖其他比赛结果才能晋级为最佳第三名球队之一。

title: Belgium thrash New Zealand to win Group G
summary: Belgium defeated New Zealand 5-1 to win Group G and advance to the World Cup round of 32. The dominant victory secured their progression as group winners on goal difference.
content: Belgium defeat New Zealand 5-1 to qualify for the World Cup round of 32 as winners of Group G on goal difference.

zh.title: 比利时5-1大胜新西兰赢得G组冠军
zh.summary: 比利时以5-1击败新西兰，赢得G组冠军并晋级世界杯32强。这场压倒性的胜利确保了他们以小组第一的身份晋级。

title: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 20
summary: An interactive guessing game challenging readers to identify a World Cup player based on their jersey number. The feature invites fan participation in real-time.
content: Will you get today's World Cup player in as few attempts as possible?

zh.title: 我是谁？猜世界杯20号明星
zh.summary: 一个互动猜谜游戏，挑战读者根据球衣号码识别一名世界杯球员。该功能邀请球迷实时参与。

title: VAR rules out late winner to deny Iran guaranteed last-32 spot
summary: VAR ruled out Shoja Khalilzadeh's injury-time goal, denying Iran automatic qualification to the round of 32 against Egypt. Iran must now rely on other results to advance as one of the best third-placed sides.
content: Shoja Khalilzadeh's goal is ruled out by VAR in injury-time denying Iran automatic qualification into the round of 32, meaning they will have to wait on other results to see if they go through as one of the best third-placed sides.

zh.title: VAR取消伊朗晚期进球，打破其32强保证名额
zh.summary: VAR判罚取消了肖贾·哈利尔扎德的伤停补时进球，否决了伊朗对埃及的自动晋级资格。伊朗现在必须依靠其他比赛结果，以最佳第三名身份进入32强。

title: 'Brilliant!' - De Bruyne gets off the mark with trademark strike
summary: Kevin De Bruyne scored his first goal of the 2026 World Cup as Belgium defeated New Zealand in Group G. The strike showcased De Bruyne's trademark finishing ability.
content: Kevin De Bruyne scores his first goal in the 2026 World Cup as Belgium beat New Zealand to finish top of Group G.

zh.title: "出色！"德布劳内以招牌远射首次破门
zh.summary: 凯文·德布劳内在2026年世界杯上首次进球，帮助比利时在G组击败新西兰。这粒进球展现了德布劳内的招牌远射能力。

title: Spain's Pino may miss rest of World Cup
summary: Spain winger Yeremy Pino faces a suspected broken collarbone injury that could sideline him for the remainder of the World Cup. The injury is a significant setback to Spain's attacking lineup.
content: Spain winger Yeremy Pino may miss the rest of the World Cup with a suspected broken collarbone.

zh.title: 西班牙球员皮诺可能缺席世界杯剩余比赛
zh.summary: 西班牙边锋耶雷米·皮诺疑似锁骨骨折，可能无法参加世界杯剩余比赛。这一伤势对西班牙的进攻阵容是一个重大打击。

title: How Cape Verde stunned World Cup to set up Argentina tie
summary: Cape Verde, an island nation with just 525,000 inhabitants, has advanced to the World Cup knockout rounds. The achievement marks a historic milestone for the small African nation.
content: How has a group of islands with just 525,000 inhabitants made it to the knockout rounds of the World Cup?

zh.title: 佛得角如何爆冷晋级世界杯淘汰赛与阿根廷对阵
zh.summary: 只有52.5万人口的岛国佛得角已晋级世界杯淘汰赛。这一成就对这个非洲小国来说是历史性的里程碑。

title: Muslera mistake gifts Spain win as 10-man Uruguay crash out 'in disgrace'
summary: Uruguay goalkeeper Fernando Muslera's error led to Spain's only goal in their group stage match. The defeat eliminated Uruguay from the World Cup in the group stage.
content: Goalkeeper Fernando Muslera's mistake gifts Alex Baena the only goal of the game, as Spain defeat Uruguay to send Marcelo Bielsa's side out of the World Cup in the group stage.

zh.title: 穆斯莱拉失误送礼西班牙，10人乌拉圭"不光彩"出局
zh.summary: 乌拉圭门神费尔南多·穆斯莱拉的失误导致西班牙在小组赛中打入唯一进球。这场失利使乌拉圭在小组赛阶段被淘汰。

title: Cape Verde's incredible World Cup journey continues after Saudi draw
summary: Cape Verde drew with Saudi Arabia and qualified for the World Cup last 32 in their tournament debut. Saudi Arabia was eliminated as a result of the draw.
content: Cape Verde deliver a valiant performance to earn their third draw of the group stage, a result that means they qualify for the last 32 in their World Cup debut while Saudi Arabia crash out.

zh.title: 佛得角在沙特平局后不可思议的世界杯之旅继续
zh.summary: 佛得角与沙特阿拉伯平局，在首次参赛中获得世界杯32强资格。这场平局导致沙特阿拉伯被淘汰。

title: England qualify for World Cup knockout stage
summary: England secured their place in the World Cup knockout stages before their final group match against Panama on Saturday. Their advancement was confirmed by other match results.
content: England's place in the knockout stages of the World Cup is confirmed by other results before they face Panama in their final group game on Saturday.

zh.title: 英格兰闯入世界杯淘汰赛阶段
zh.summary: 英格兰在与巴拿马的最后一场小组赛之前确保了进入世界杯淘汰赛阶段。其他比赛结果证实了他们的晋级。

title: 'The fairytale continues!' Emotional scenes as Cape Verde qualify for last 32
summary: Cape Verde confirmed qualification for the World Cup last 32 after earning a draw against Saudi Arabia in Houston, sparking jubilant celebrations among players and fans. The island nation's fairytale World Cup journey continues.
content: Jubilation and tears among Cape Verde fans and players as they confirm their 'miracle' qualification for the last 32 of the World Cup after earning a point against Saudi Arabia in Houston.

zh.title: "童话继续！"佛得角闯入32强引发激动场景
zh.summary: 佛得角在休斯敦与沙特阿拉伯平局后确认晋级世界杯32强，引发球员和球迷的欢乐庆祝。这个岛国的童话般世界杯之旅继续。

title: Follow live: Spain take lead over Uruguay in Group...
summary: Spain led Uruguay in a group stage match during tournament play. Live coverage tracked the competitive fixture in real-time.
content: null

zh.title: 直播跟踪：西班牙在小组赛中领先乌拉圭...
zh.summary: 西班牙在锦标赛小组阶段比赛中领先乌拉圭。实时直播报道了这场竞争激烈的比赛。

title: 'No rules, no protocols': Inside the system that p...
summary: An investigation found systematic exploitation within Argentina's soccer development system that produced World Cup champions. The findings raise ethical questions about the cost of international success.
content: An investigation into Argentina's soccer system that produced the defending World Cup champions found that it is rife with exploitation.

zh.title: "无规则，无协议"：深入阿根廷足球体系内部...
zh.summary: 一项调查发现阿根廷足球发展体系内存在系统性剥削，该体系培养了世界杯冠军。这些发现提出了关于国际成功代价的伦理问题。

title: Sources: Poch in positive talks over USMNT deal
summary: Mauricio Pochettino and U.S. Soccer held positive discussions about extending his USMNT coaching contract. The potential continuation signals stability in American national team leadership.
content: United States men's national team coach Mauricio Pochettino and U.S. Soccer have had positive talks about a possible contract extension, sources told ESPN.

zh.title: 消息人士：波切蒂诺就美国足协合约延期进行积极谈判
zh.summary: 毛里西奥·波切蒂诺与美国足协就延长其美国国家队教练合约进行了积极讨论。合约的潜在延续表明了美国国家队领导层的稳定性。

title: Norway coach: No Haaland vs. France a 'no-brainer'...
summary: Norway's coach rested star player Erling Haaland and nine other first-team players against France based on fatigue detected in medical testing. The decision prioritizes player health over competitive advantage.
content: Norway coach Stale Solbakken said his decision to rest 10 first-team players, including Erling Haaland, against France was a "no-brainer" due to medical tests showing fatigue affecting several members of his squad.

zh.title: 挪威教练：不派哈兰德对阵法国是"显而易见的选择"
zh.summary: 挪威教练根据医学检测发现的疲劳情况，让球星埃林·哈兰德和另外九名主力球员在对阵法国的比赛中轮休。这一决定优先考虑球员健康而非竞争优势。

title: Sources: Madrid want Camavinga exit to sign MF
summary: Real Madrid halted midfielder acquisitions under José Mourinho until the club offloads current midfielders, potentially including Camavinga. The approach reflects the club's financial discipline and squad balance priorities.
content: José Mourinho would still like to sign a new midfielder at Real Madrid -- but the club has decided to put any further arrivals on hold until at least one of the current midfielders leave, sources have told ESPN.

zh.title: 消息人士：皇马欲甩掉卡马文加以签约中场
zh.summary: 在何塞·穆里尼奥的领导下，皇马暂停中场引援，直到俱乐部处理掉现有中场球员，卡马文加可能被甩卖。这种做法体现了俱乐部在财务纪律和阵容平衡方面的优先考量。

title: Messi to start on bench for Argentina group finale...
summary: Lionel Messi will begin Argentina's final group match against Jordan from the substitutes' bench, according to coach Scaloni. The decision likely reflects rotation strategy as the team prepares for knockout stages.
content: Lionel Messi will start Argentina's final group stage match against Jordan on Saturday from the substitutes' bench, coach Lionel Scaloni said.

zh.title: 梅西将从替补席开始阿根廷小组赛最后一战
zh.summary: 据教练斯卡洛尼透露，莱昂内尔·梅西将在阿根廷对约旦的小组赛最后一场比赛中首发坐在替补席。这一决定可能反映了球队为淘汰赛阶段做出的轮换策略。

title: Algeria, Austria, reject group math to avoid Spain...
summary: Austria and Algeria both committed to pursuing victory against each other despite tournament mathematics suggesting a draw would benefit their knockout prospects. Both teams chose sporting integrity over strategic advantage.
content: Austria and Algeria have both insisted they will be going for a victory when the two teams face off on Saturday, despite not winning potentially being more beneficial to their knockout round draw.

zh.title: 阿尔及利亚和奥地利拒绝战术让步 力求对阵胜利
zh.summary: 奥地利和阿尔及利亚都致力于相互对阵时追求胜利，尽管比赛数学表明平局对其淘汰赛前景更有利。两队选择了运动精神而非战术优势。

title: Milan name CEO amid Pulisic transfer approach
summary: AC Milan appointed Massimo Calvelli as CEO to restore winning culture while rejecting a transfer offer from New York City FC for Christian Pulisic. The leadership change signals the club's rebuilding ambitions.
content: In a bid to "bring a winning culture" back to the club, AC Milan named Massimo Calvelli as CEO, one day after sources told ESPN they rejected an approach from New York City FC for United States attacker Christian Pulisic.

zh.title: 米兰任命新CEO 应对普利西奇转会风波
zh.summary: AC米兰任命马西莫·卡尔维利为首席执行官以恢复胜利文化，同时拒绝了纽约城FC对克里斯蒂安·普利西奇的转会报价。这一领导层变动预示了俱乐部的重建野心。

title: Sources: Newcastle reject Arsenal Guimarães bid
summary: Newcastle rejected Arsenal's £55 million bid for Brazilian midfielder Bruno Guimaraes. The rejection demonstrates Newcastle's strong negotiating position and commitment to retaining key players.
content: Arsenal have had a £55 million ($73m) offer for Bruno Guimarães rejected by Newcastle United, sources have told ESPN Brasil.

zh.title: 纽卡斯尔拒绝阿森纳关于圭马良斯的报价
zh.summary: 纽卡斯尔拒绝了阿森纳为巴西中场球员布鲁诺·圭马良斯开出的5500万英镑报价。这一拒绝表明纽卡斯尔谈判地位强劲，致力于留住关键球员。

title: Deschamps to rejoin France after mom's funeral
summary: France coach Didier Deschamps rejoined the squad after attending his mother's funeral, having missed Friday's 4-1 victory over Norway. The team continued preparations for upcoming matches under his return.
content: FOXBOROUGH, Mass. -- Didier Deschamps will fly back to Boston on Saturday and be reunited with the France squad after missing the 4-1 win against Norway on Friday to attend the funeral of his mother.

zh.title: 德尚母亲葬礼后重返法国队
zh.summary: 法国主教练迪迪埃·德尚在参加母亲葬礼后重返球队，缺席了周五法国4:1战胜挪威的比赛。球队在他回归后继续为即将进行的比赛做准备。

title: Ballon d'Dembélé! Hat-trick vs. Norway shows Franc...
summary: Ousmane Dembélé scored a hat-trick in France's 4-1 victory over Norway, showcasing the depth of French attacking talent. The dominant performance demonstrated France's strength despite facing a rested opponent.
content: It didn't matter that Norway rested all their stars, because the galaxy of French talent -- led by the remarkable Ousmane Dembélé -- shone as brightly as ever in a 4-1 win.

zh.title: 德姆贝莱帽子戏法！对阵挪威展现法国实力
zh.summary: 乌斯曼·德姆贝莱在法国4:1战胜挪威的比赛中打进帽子戏法，展现了法国锋线的深度。这场压倒性胜利展示了法国的强大实力，尽管对手是一支已休息的球队。

title: Backs against the wall, Ecuador conjure World Cup ...
summary: Ecuador secured a crucial victory against heavily favored Germany in a must-win World Cup match, reviving their tournament hopes. The upset showcased Ecuador's resilience and improved finishing under pressure.
content: The equation for Ecuador was simple: win or go home. And just in time, they found their scoring touch vs. a heavily favored Germany.

zh.title: 背水一战，厄瓜多尔创造世界杯奇迹
zh.summary: 厄瓜多尔在一场必须取胜的世界杯比赛中战胜实力强大的德国，重振了他们的锦标赛希望。这场冷门展示了厄瓜多尔的韧性以及在压力下的出色发挥。

title: If Japan are dreaming of winning the World Cup, Br...
summary: Japan's World Cup championship aspirations face significant challenges compared to traditional powerhouses like Brazil. The analysis examines whether Japan can elevate its tournament performance to competitive levels.
content: null

zh.title: 日本若梦想赢得世界杯，巴西...
zh.summary: 与巴西等传统强国相比，日本的世界杯冠军梦想面临重大挑战。该分析考察了日本是否能够将其锦标赛表现提升到具有竞争力的水平。

title: Pulisic looks ready to make his mark on USMNT's Wo...
summary: Christian Pulisic showed promise against Türkiye despite the USMNT's mixed overall performance, with focus shifting to his upcoming World Cup impact. Pulisic's future contributions will be vital to American tournament success.
content: Christian Pulisic's experience vs. Türkiye mirrored that of the U.S. team: The beginning was terrific. The ending stunk. And none of it matters nearly as much as what comes next.

zh.title: 普利西奇准备在美国队世界杯中留下印记
zh.summary: 克里斯蒂安·普利西奇在对阵土耳其的比赛中表现出前景，尽管美国队整体表现不均。焦点现已转向他对即将到来的世界杯的影响。普利西奇的未来贡献对美国队的锦标赛成功至关重要。
